hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, os, sys
north_star = 'PROJECT_NORTH_STAR.md'
if not os.path.exists(north_star):
    sys.exit(0)
content = open(north_star).read()
msg = 'MEMORY STEWARD ACTIVE\\n\\nThis project is managed by memory-steward. Before any other work, you must run the session-start alignment check:\\n1. You already have the North Star below injected into context - read it fully.\\n2. Check for roadmap/spec files and read them in full.\\n3. Present an alignment summary to the user and ask if anything has changed before starting work.\\n\\n--- PROJECT NORTH STAR ---\\n' + content
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': msg}}))
"
